evals.prompt: I have a 5,000-subscriber newsletter about SaaS metrics. How should I monetize it?
evals.expected_output: Monetization strategy recommending sponsorships (high-CPM B2B niche) and/or paid subscriptions with pricing guidance

assertions.name: recommends_model
assertions.description: Recommends at least one monetization model (sponsorships, paid subscriptions, or paid recommendations) with reasoning

assertions.name: niche_pricing
assertions.description: Accounts for B2B/SaaS niche in pricing guidance (higher CPM than general interest)

assertions.name: actionable_steps
assertions.description: Provides concrete next steps to implement the recommended model

evals.prompt: How do I price my newsletter sponsorships? I get 4,200 opens per issue.
evals.expected_output: Sponsorship pricing calculation based on CPM with rate card guidance

assertions.name: uses_cpm
assertions.description: Calculates pricing using CPM (cost per 1,000 opens) model

assertions.name: provides_range
assertions.description: Gives a specific price range based on the 4,200 opens figure

assertions.name: mentions_rate_card
assertions.description: Suggests creating a rate card or media kit with key elements

evals.prompt: Should I use Kit or Substack for a paid newsletter?
evals.expected_output: Platform comparison covering fees, features, and trade-offs for paid newsletters

assertions.name: compares_fees
assertions.description: Compares Kit's 0.6% + Stripe fees vs Substack's 10% + Stripe fees

assertions.name: compares_features
assertions.description: Compares relevant features (automation, design, discovery network)

assertions.name: gives_recommendation
assertions.description: Provides a recommendation based on the user's situation or criteria to decide
